reference: SOT pretrain baseline (for reference, all from single RTX 3090, bs=32)
paper_reference: 56.5 SR / 70.2 PR / 66.5 NPR (4 GPU, bs=128 total)

L1_Sprint.note: 20% data, 4 epochs - reaches ~97% of full performance

L2_Verify.config: 8ep x 30k smpl, bs=32, 245 seq full test
L2_Verify.note: 50% data, 8 epochs - no meaningful improvement over L1

L3_Full.config: 15ep x 60k smpl, bs=32, 245 seq full test
L3_Full.note: 100% data, 15 epochs, LR@10 - matches L1 within noise

conclusion: L1 Sprint (50min) already reaches ~95-97% of Full (6h). Use L1 for fast iteration.
